Home / About

Built For
The Streets

"Great kicks shouldn't cost a fortune — premium looks, real comfort and fair prices."

AEROX began with a simple frustration: hyped sneakers priced out of reach, and cheap copies that fell apart. We knew there was a better way — premium-grade kicks at a price that makes sense.

So we obsessed over the details that matter — genuine leather uppers, accurate builds, cushioned soles and clean stitching. Every pair is checked before it ships, so what you see is what lands at your door.

Today, thousands across India lace up in AEROX — on campus, on the commute and out on the streets. Premium kicks, fair prices. That's the whole idea.

01

Comfort

Cushioned soles designed for all-day wear.

02

Authenticity

Accurate builds and detailing, checked pair by pair.

03

Style

Clean, iconic silhouettes that go with everything.

04

Quality

Durable materials, built to outlast the hype.

The Unboxing

Packaged Like
A Gift

Every AEROX order ships in its original branded box with tissue wrap and secure packaging — premium from the moment it lands at your door.

Home / Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

AEROX respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.

Information We Collect

We collect details you provide at checkout — name, shipping address, email, phone and payment confirmation. We also collect basic analytics to improve the store experience.

How We Use It

To process orders, provide support, send order updates, and — only if you opt in — share offers from the AEROX Club. We never sell your personal data.

Payment Security

Payments are processed by PCI-compliant gateways. We do not store full card numbers on our servers.

Your Rights

You can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data anytime by writing to care@aerox.example.

Home / Refund Policy

Refund Policy

7-Day Easy Returns

Items can be returned only if unworn and in their original box with tags within 7 days of delivery.

How To Return

Email care@aerox.example with your order number. We'll arrange a free reverse pickup in serviceable pincodes.

Refund Timeline

Once your return passes inspection, refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5–7 business days.

Exchanges

Wrong size? We offer free one-time size exchanges, subject to stock availability.

Home / Terms & Conditions

Terms &
Conditions

Use Of Site

By using aerox.example you agree to these terms. All content, designs and the AEROX™ trademark are property of AEROX and may not be reproduced without permission.

Orders & Pricing

All prices are in INR and inclusive of applicable taxes. We reserve the right to cancel orders flagged for error or fraud, with a full refund.

Shipping

Estimated delivery times are indicative. Risk passes to you on delivery to the address provided at checkout.

Liability

AEROX is not liable for indirect or consequential losses arising from use of the products beyond the order value.
